title: Workforms - Duplicate item with all conditions
excerpt: The work forms last update added the ability to duplicate an item, but it didn’t allow the conditions to be duplicated. It is a long process to create the conditions and would be a real time saver to be able to duplicate…

posts.author: MLPalm (Mike L)
posts.cookedHtml: The work forms last update added the ability to duplicate an item, but it didn’t allow the conditions to be duplicated. It is a long process to create the conditions and would be a real time saver to be able to duplicate the complete item.

posts.author: davidmiller (David Millar)
posts.cookedHtml: The recent update allows item duplication, but conditions aren’t duplicated. It would be beneficial to include this feature, as recreating conditions is time-consuming. This enhancement would significantly improve workflow efficiency.
